name: Japanese Salad
recipeInstructions:
1. Toast sesame seeds on a cookie sheet in the oven; set aside.
2. Cook noodles in boiling water until tender (about 10 minutes), then drain and rinse. Transfer to a large bowl. Add shrimp and green onions; mix well.
3. Mix olive oil and sesame oil together; heat about 2 Tbsp of oil in a pan and sauté mushrooms for 5 minutes. Add to the shrimp.
4. Blend soy sauce, sake (or white wine), sesame seeds, ginger, garlic, and remaining oil until combined. Cover and refrigerate for 2 hours.
5. In a separate bowl, beat eggs and stir in seaweed. Heat a skillet with oil and add 1/4 of the egg mixture. Cook until it loosens from the pan, then turn over and place on a work surface. Make 3 more thin egg/seaweed pancakes.
6. Slice the pancakes into thin strips. Toss with chilled noodles. Spoon and serve.
